description_long: This object consists of two elegant nightstands placed side by side, each featuring a classic, ornate design with gently curved legs and a lower shelf for additional storage. One nightstand is finished in a glossy black with gold trim along the top edge, while the other is a smooth, light gray or off-white color. Both nightstands have a square tabletop with softly undulating edges, adding a touch of sophistication. The legs are cabriole-style, with subtle decorative flourishes at the top, and each nightstand has a single drawer with a small, unobtrusive handle. The surfaces are highly polished, reflecting light and emphasizing the luxurious finish. These nightstands would typically be found in upscale urban interiors, such as beside a bed or in a stylish living area.
description: A pair of ornate nightstands, one glossy black with gold trim and one light gray, each with curved legs, a single drawer, and a lower shelf.
description_view_0: Front view showing both nightstands side by side, highlighting the black and gold trim on the left and the light gray finish on the right, with visible drawers and lower shelves.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the depth and curved leg design, with the light gray nightstand in the foreground and the black one partially behind.
description_view_2: Rear view of both nightstands, showing the back panels and the continuation of the curved leg design, with the light gray nightstand on the left and the black on the right.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the black nightstand in the foreground, showcasing the gold trim and glossy finish, and the light gray nightstand behind.
attribute_leg_design: ornate cabriole legs with decorative flourishes
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
